controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 8161637.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday September 1, 2020 at 23:11

did.abstract: Collection consists of lantern slides of architecture, mostly Gothic and mostly European. They are fully identified on the labels. Most of the views seem to be stock photography from sources such as Alinari.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Further use of this material may be subject to the copyright laws of the United States (Title 17, United States Code) or to site license or other rights management terms or conditions.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Miscellaneous Architecture Lantern Slide Collection, Arts Library, Yale University

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection consists of lantern slides of architecture, mostly Gothic and mostly European. They are fully identified on the labels. Most of the views seem to be stock photography from sources such as Alinari.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Slides are arranged by country, and within country, alphabetically by city.

did.unittitle: Derbyshire (Haddon Hall, Wingfield Manor, Hardwick Hall)
Comparisons and examples of English Gothic architecture
General French Architecture comparisons and examples
Miscellaneous Italian and Roman Architecture comparisons, plans, etc.
Miscellaneous Spanish Architecture, including El Escorial, gardens, and comparisons.
Syria, Turkey, Yugoslavia, and Miscellaneous Buildings
